---
title: |
  High Returns, Low Investment: the Euler Equation Puzzle and Collective Action
format:
  aea-pdf:
    keep-tex: false  
    journal:
      blinded: false
    indent: true
    citecolor: cyan
    linkcolor: cyan
    urlcolor: cyan
  aea-html: default
title-footnote: |
  Some footnotes on the title...
author-format: horizontal
author:
  - name: Yichu Li
    acknowledgements: | 
      The London School of Economics and Political Science. y.li395@lse.ac.uk.
date: last-modified
articleurl: https://hchulkim.github.io
abstract: |
  The text of your abstract.
keywords:
  - Euler Equation, Collective Action, Public Investment, Tax
bibliography: bibliography.bib  
---

## Introduction {#sec-intro}

I will show some examples of things you can easily do in quarto-format.Results

## Conclusion {#sec-conc}

## References {.unnumbered}

::: {#refs}
:::

## Appendix {.supplementary}

`{.supplementary}` works as an indicator that makes the section centered. Useful when starting an appendix or supplementary sections.

### Appendix A {.unnumbered}

Use `{.unnumbered}` to unnumber the section and give your own numbering.

### Appendix B {.unnumbered}

## Supplementary {.supplementary}
